use_cases: Scrollable container for long-form content in dashboards
Timeline and feed views with overflow scrolling
Vertical or horizontal scroll regions in responsive layouts
Content areas requiring custom scrollbar styling
Nested scroll contexts within complex page layouts
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based scrollable container component with configurable orientation (vertical, horizontal, both) and customizable scrollbar visibility behavior. Built with Tailwind CSS and class variance authority for flexible styling. Provides a polished scrolling experience with smooth transitions and configurable auto-hide functionality for scrollbars.
